description: EVERYDAY BABY ESSENTIAL: This 6 pack of baby bodysuits are lovely quality, making them perfect for all baby essentials. Ideal for baby essentials, newborn gifts, home from hospital bags. BODYSUIT MATERIAL: Made from 100% Cotton fabric, these baby bodysuits are made of soft high quality cotton fabric, perfect for babies skin. LOVELY FIT & EASY TO MAINTAIN: Available in various sizes from Newborn to 2 years, ensuring a comfortable and cosy fit. Machine washable and designed to retain its colour and softness, wash after wash. POPPER FASTENING CLOSURE: The short sleeved baby bodysuit vest comes with press stud popper snap buttons and an envelope opening to the neck, made to ensure ease of changing and dressing. PACK QUANTITY: There are 6 baby bodysuits in each pack, perfect for babies wardrobe. SIZES: 0 Months, 0-3 Months, 3-6 Months, 6-9 Months, 9-12 Months, 12-18 Months, 18-24 Months.
